entry.title: Replying to @Beth Treasure hunt! I just hid a $25 gift card in San Francisco for someone to find!! This gift card is to @Woods Beer & Wine Co - I love their vibe, their beer and how they have so many locations in the city. And they are dog friendly!!! T

entry.title: Be careful though! it's incredibly hard to not buy everything 😅 Alameda Flea Market / Antiques Fair really is the BEST thrift and antique spot in California imo Tips: 💵 bring all cash! 🎫 get the early bird slot before 7:30am to avoid crowds 🪑 barter with
entry.content: Be careful though! it's incredibly hard to not buy everything 😅 Alameda Flea Market / Antiques Fair really is the BEST thrift and antique spot in California imo Tips: 💵 bring all cash! 🎫 get the early bird slot before 7:30am to avoid crowds 🪑 barter with

entry.title: secret swimming holes are our favorite 🤩 YES you can go swimming inside Big Trees State Park! It's best to ask the rangers when you drive in, they'll point you to spots along the river that are good and also safe to swim in that day. But my favorite is a

entry.title: ngl, London solo is simply *the best* 🇬🇧 Earlier this summer I spent a weekend in London by myself and had THE BEST time just walking around listening to an audiobook (Fourth Wing in case you're curious), eating all the good food and taking in the sights
entry.content: ngl, London solo is simply *the best* 🇬🇧 Earlier this summer I spent a weekend in London by myself and had THE BEST time just walking around listening to an audiobook (Fourth Wing in case you're curious), eating all the good food and taking in the sights

entry.title: Shakespeare's Globe Theatre is still around and you can watch plays inside it!!! Robin and I went to a show here on our honeymoon back in 2017 and during my solo trip this summer to London, I decided I wanted to go again since it's honestly so fun and so
entry.content: Shakespeare's Globe Theatre is still around and you can watch plays inside it!!! Robin and I went to a show here on our honeymoon back in 2017 and during my solo trip this summer to London, I decided I wanted to go again since it's honestly so fun and so

entry.title: Replying to @maya the BEST tea service in London 🇬🇧🫖 I've been to Sketch multiple times and it's always a treat.I love stuffing myself with wee little sandwiches and desserts while sipping bubbly and endless pots of tea. Plus, their bathroom is so iconic
entry.content: Replying to @maya the BEST tea service in London 🇬🇧🫖 I've been to Sketch multiple times and it's always a treat.I love stuffing myself with wee little sandwiches and desserts while sipping bubbly and endless pots of tea. Plus, their bathroom is so iconic

entry.title: best martini in London ⬇️🍸 Swans Bar at Maison Assoulin is tucked inside a bookstore off Piccadilly and has the best dang martini I've sipped in a long, long time. Dirty Gibson martini - I'll be back for you next time I'm in England 🇬🇧❤️ (send this to
entry.content: best martini in London ⬇️🍸 Swans Bar at Maison Assoulin is tucked inside a bookstore off Piccadilly and has the best dang martini I've sipped in a long, long time. Dirty Gibson martini - I'll be back for you next time I'm in England 🇬🇧❤️ (send this to

entry.title: Why did someone make this? 😂 can't wait to hang this ridiculous Christmas ornament on my tree this year. Low key think it should of been designed so anne Boleyn's head would detach but whatever #christmasornaments #toweroflondon #london #anneboleyn #humor

entry.title: dogs - who SURF!! 🏄🐶🌊 Headed down to Pacifica today to catch the world dog surfing competition. It's full of cuteness and athleticism (100% makes up for not being in Paris to catch the Olympics!) Here's how dog surfing works: Dogs in each heat have 10 m
